violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer broken down to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The meat grip of the slicer was observed in poor repair (broken/missing spikes). Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Ham was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product was voluntarily disposed of Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Various food product was observed held at 44-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Some food product was separated into smaller portions in put into colder refrigeration units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
